name: player_espn_line_win_rate range year_offset takes the window AVG (executed-result parity)
description: Seed one player with 2024 win_rate=0.40 and 2025 win_rate=0.60 (PASS_RUSH), then run player_espn_line_win_rate with year=[2023] + year_offset=[1,2]. The win rate must equal the window AVG (0.50), not the SUM (1.00) -- a win-rate percentage is not additive across seasons. Proves ESPN win-rate columns reduce with AVG, not the default SUM.
expected_query: select "player"."pid", player.fname, player.lname, (SELECT AVG(espn_player_win_rates_index.win_rate) FROM espn_player_win_rates_index WHERE espn_player_win_rates_index.pid = player.pid AND espn_player_win_rates_index.year IN (2024,2025) AND espn_player_win_rates_index.espn_win_rate_type = 'PASS_RUSH') AS "espn_line_win_rate_0", "player"."pos" from "player" where player.pos IN ('ZZ') group by player.fname, player.lname, "player"."pid", "player"."lname", "player"."fname", "player"."pos" order by "player"."pid" asc limit 500

seed: INSERT INTO player (pid, fname, lname, pname, formatted, pos, pos1, dob, nfl_draft_year) VALUES ('TEST-ESPN-2000-2000-01-01', 'Test', 'Espn', 'T.Espn', 'Test Espn', 'ZZ', 'ZZ', '2000-01-01', 2020)

INSERT INTO espn_player_win_rates_index (pid, player_name, espn_id, team, wins, plays, win_rate, double_team_pct, espn_win_rate_type, timestamp, year) VALUES ('TEST-ESPN-2000-2000-01-01', 'Test Espn', 9990001, 'KC', 40, 100, 0.40, 0.10, 'PASS_RUSH', 1700000000, 2024)

INSERT INTO espn_player_win_rates_index (pid, player_name, espn_id, team, wins, plays, win_rate, double_team_pct, espn_win_rate_type, timestamp, year) VALUES ('TEST-ESPN-2000-2000-01-01', 'Test Espn', 9990001, 'KC', 60, 100, 0.60, 0.10, 'PASS_RUSH', 1700000000, 2025)
result_equivalence.reference_sql: SELECT AVG(win_rate) AS espn_line_win_rate_0 FROM espn_player_win_rates_index WHERE pid = 'TEST-ESPN-2000-2000-01-01' AND year IN (2024,2025) AND espn_win_rate_type = 'PASS_RUSH'
